title: Deal Template
description: Pre-populated mindmap structure that opens into a working Map when selected. A template is the operator playbook for a deal type — Acquire, Series A, M&A, Fix & Flip, Services / Agency, etc. Operations agent owns this surface; Conductor routes template selection events to Operations.

id.description: Stable identifier (kebab-case). Example: acquire, series-a, fix-and-flip, m-and-a, services-agency.

name.description: Display name for the template card.

description.description: One-line operator description shown on the gallery card.

deal_type.description: Maps to the deal_type on the resulting deal record. Free-form so any operator can spin a new category later.

events_emitted.description: User picks a template on /suite/maps/new. Conductor routes to Operations agent to provision the new map.
Operations agent creates the map + nodes + edges from the template and emits this on success. Sales agent may pick this up to schedule the first qualifying / discovery action based on the deal_type.
